1Spain2165719460+1578034030213846113818115916972Argentina2113519870‚àí281109381419309610228271211211363France20821617950+51938473341124474269195170612724England2020419830+91161510524127683216262271911205Brazil1984419980‚àí9106537234634767017222322949545Portugal1984191797+1‚àí469432026211234618915912227797Colombia1975491620+2+246481842292352652051788427418Netherlands19611518480‚àí5901429358114465239197189211429Ecuador1933641525+3+2259818321120418325416171990310Croatia1930121881+2+19398156167752098310669440111Germany192381911‚àí4‚àí6410454694151616042242172352123212Norway1912381622+9+83886425409523343551971373144313Japan1904621466+1+28835331207297408257170151798514Turkey1902431610+4+656692903007926325015694796915Uruguay1892121876‚àí5‚àí2910193364322514463212521610125416Switzerland1889271690+8+77895425392783193732031335148217Senegal1879571590+13+12070422125922431919219396766918Denmark1870201798‚àí3+8903413396944192981861650122019Belgium1866241755‚àí3+22876415375863903021841599135920Mexico1858201783+3+4110272962734585322582371821105521Italy185681916‚àí10‚àí58902407324171480177245158189422Paraguay1833231755+5+337882143652092763032091002111523Austria1827201810‚àí5‚àí10865431383513703101851560132124Morocco1821431656+2+15727317219191363165199109861425Canada1784481604+4+648514920013618918311362261326Australia1783341672+10+46635271223141326179130128971427Russia1776241742+1‚àí15812311382119430173209147677828Serbia1769201787‚àí11‚àí748603024231354032651921617117329Scotland1767141879+5+25866402412524102681881488107329Ukraine1767311745‚àí4‚àí4233813414460153909547535631Iran1760411658‚àí11‚àí70668223195250382132154127052432South
